goal: Use mask layers plus regular target card PNGs to produce WARD Zero variant cards that preserve exact card layout while converting the illustration/art mood to monochrome Zero style.

canonical_output.note: Use the target regular PNG canvas size for final card outputs unless a newer master template replaces it.

primary_alignment_anchor.reason: The AL box is the only stable non-resizing box across cards; use it for scale, rotation, skew, and perspective correction.

approximate_primary_target_quad_for_rapt.note: Approximate centerline/outer-stroke coordinates from visual inspection only; re-mark exact corners before production.

mask_processing.current_state: The provided mask layers are visual/reference masks and are not all the same pixel size as the target card PNGs.
mask_processing.required_before_overlay: Do not directly overlay masks by canvas position. First normalize/warp masks and target cards by the AL box corner anchor.

threshold_guidance.feature_pixels: Use bright white regions/lines as feature geometry. If converting to binary alpha, threshold luminance high enough to exclude dim gray registration guides.
threshold_guidance.registration_guides: Gray dashed lines and crosshairs are alignment guides. Keep them only as invisible/low-alpha registration marks or ignore them in the final binary mask.

masks.role: Footer metadata strip zones: edition/copyright area, set-number box, illustrator field, plus guide lines.
masks.notes: Visual mask/reference layer. White feature areas are intended mask zones; gray dashed lines/crosshairs are registration guides and should not be included in final feature alpha.

masks.role: Full static card frame, art-window boundary, rules-panel boundary, distressed edge structure, top stat box outlines.
masks.notes: Visual mask/reference layer. White feature areas are intended mask zones; gray dashed lines/crosshairs are registration guides and should not be included in final feature alpha.

masks.role: Top creature-name bar plus AL, HP, and SPD panel masks. AL is the primary alignment anchor.
masks.notes: Visual mask/reference layer. White feature areas are intended mask zones; gray dashed lines/crosshairs are registration guides and should not be included in final feature alpha.

masks.role: Zero logo placement/shape zone near the upper-left art/header area.
masks.notes: Visual mask/reference layer. White feature areas are intended mask zones; gray dashed lines/crosshairs are registration guides and should not be included in final feature alpha.

masks.role: Lower rules/effect text panel mask with torn/rough upper edge and lower border detail.
masks.notes: Visual mask/reference layer. White feature areas are intended mask zones; gray dashed lines/crosshairs are registration guides and should not be included in final feature alpha.

masks.role: Main illustration/art window frame and static distressed inner-edge geometry.
masks.notes: Visual mask/reference layer. White feature areas are intended mask zones; gray dashed lines/crosshairs are registration guides and should not be included in final feature alpha.

masks.role: Right-side circular bonus/modifier badge with brush-ring silhouette. Text is not part of the mask.
masks.notes: Visual mask/reference layer. White feature areas are intended mask zones; gray dashed lines/crosshairs are registration guides and should not be included in final feature alpha.

masks.role: Attack strip, attack-name zone, attack-value zone, and die-icon zone.
masks.notes: Visual mask/reference layer. White feature areas are intended mask zones; gray dashed lines/crosshairs are registration guides and should not be included in final feature alpha.

masks.role: Upper-left cluster: rarity pip, generation/rank label zone, faction medallion, and Zero-logo region.
masks.notes: Visual mask/reference layer. White feature areas are intended mask zones; gray dashed lines/crosshairs are registration guides and should not be included in final feature alpha.

template_reference.role: Visual reference template only. Do not use as a binary mask layer.

target_regular_cards.role: Primary full-color regular target card for testing Zero conversion.
